task_completion.description: Verify that the location is set to Saint-Rémy-de-Provence and the time is set to June 19, 1889, 04:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom information bar or the Location/Date/Time windows in Stellarium display 'Saint-Rémy-de-Provence' (or coordinates 43.789°N, 4.831°E), '1889-06-19', and '04:30'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required display settings are applied in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ground/landscape is hidden (stars are visible where the ground would normally be), atmosphere is enabled (the sky has a pre-dawn glow or the atmosphere icon is toggled on in the bottom toolbar), constellation lines are drawn, and planet labels are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent viewed Venus and Aldebaran in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows Venus and the star Aldebaran, possibly selected, centered, or clearly visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent viewed a wide field of the eastern sky.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view is zoomed out facing East (indicated by an 'E' on the compass if visible, or general orientation) showing multiple constellations at once.

task_completion.description: Verify that the analysis document was created with the required notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'starry_night_analysis.txt' containing notes about the date, location, Venus visibility, nearby constellations, and an assessment of the painting's accuracy.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Stellarium application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium GUI being actively used and configured, rather than the agent just looking up information in a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the analysis document appears to be written based on the agent's observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in starry_night_analysis.txt reflects details that would be seen in the Stellarium simulation, rather than a generic or copy-pasted response.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI to configure Stellarium and take screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through Stellarium menus, using its keyboard shortcuts, or interacting with the application window, rather than just running a script to generate the outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, France (43.789°N, 4.831°E, 60m). Target Date/Time: June 19, 1889, 04:30 UTC. Required Display Settings: Atmosphere ON, Landscape/Ground OFF, Constellation lines ON, Planet labels ON. Celestial targets to observe: Venus and Aldebaran. Output file: ~/Desktop/starry_night_analysis.txt containing date, location, Venus visibility, nearby constellations, and accuracy assessment.
